title: Oracle Commerce Training
description:
This Oracle Commerce Training will help you learn how to design, develop, customize and personalize the online buying experience of your Oracle Commerce solution to help increase conversions and order value and ensure ongoing customer loyalty.

During the training you will learn the skills required for configuring, customize, deploying and maintaining your Commerce solution. You will also learn how to use the business tools to create a dynamic and compelling site experience to attract, convert and retain customers.

After the training you will be able to implement and use Guided Search so that your customers can find relevant and desired items on your web site.
